meta.summary: Bakta 1.12.0 runtime for rapid standardized bacterial, plasmid, and MAG annotation. Production Bakta databases are mandatory and user-provided via --db or BAKTA_DB.
meta.description: Bakta 1.12.0 runtime for rapid standardized bacterial, plasmid, and MAG annotation. Production Bakta databases are mandatory and user-provided via --db or BAKTA_DB.

test: bakta --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'bakta 1.12.0' >/dev/null && bakta --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'usage: bakta' >/dev/null && bakta_db --help 2>&1 | grep -F '{list,download,install,update}' >/dev/null && bakta_proteins --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'usage: bakta_proteins' >/dev/null && bakta_plot --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'usage: bakta_plot' >/dev/null && bakta_io --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'usage: bakta_io' >/dev/null
python3 -c 'import bakta; print(bakta.__version__, bakta.__db_schema_version__)' | grep -Fx '1.12.0 6' >/dev/null && bakta_db --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'bakta_db 1.12.0' >/dev/null

diamond version 2>&1 | grep -F 'diamond version 2.1.21' >/dev/null && blastn -version 2>&1 | grep -F 'blastn: 2.17.0' >/dev/null && makeblastdb -version 2>&1 | grep -F 'makeblastdb: 2.17.0' >/dev/null && amrfinder --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx '4.2.7' >/dev/null && tRNAscan-SE -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'tRNAscan-SE 2.0.12' >/dev/null && aragorn -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'ARAGORN v1.2.41' >/dev/null && cmscan -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'INFERNAL 1.1.5' >/dev/null && pilercr -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'pilercr v1.06' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-bakta-smoke-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; printf '>tiny\nATGAAATAA\n' > "$tmp/tiny.fa"; if bakta --db "$tmp/no-db" --output "$tmp/out" --prefix tiny "$tmp/tiny.fa" > "$tmp/run.log" 2>&1; then cat "$tmp/run.log" >&2; exit 1; fi; grep -Ei 'database|db' "$tmp/run.log" >/dev/null; test ! -e "$tmp/out/tiny.gff3"; rm -rf "$tmp"
